news.title:
Blue Dart Express Ltd reported Q3 FY26 revenue of INR 16,161 million and profit of INR 700 million, driven by robust domestic demand and SME activity.
Key growth areas include e-commerce at 30-31% of revenue, with ground shipments growing slower than surface operations. Margins remain steady with festive season support.
news.summary:
Blue Dart Express Ltd reported Q3 FY26 revenue of INR 16,161 million and profit of INR 700 million, driven by robust domestic demand and SME activity.
Key growth areas include e-commerce at 30-31% of revenue, with ground shipments growing slower than surface operations. Margins remain steady with festive season support.

news.title:
Indian airlines reported ₹5,289.7 cr losses in FY25; Air India Group's share was ₹9,808.1 cr.
Among 11 operators, 4 reported profits: IndiGo, Blue Dart, Star Air, and IndiaOne Air.
news.summary:
Indian airlines reported ₹5,289.7 cr losses in FY25; Air India Group's share was ₹9,808.1 cr.
Among 11 operators, 4 reported profits: IndiGo, Blue Dart, Star Air, and IndiaOne Air.

news.title:
Blue Dart shares Jan 2026 investor presentation, highlighting market leadership.
FY24-25 sales: ₹57,202 mn, EBITDA: ₹5,739 mn, EBT: ₹3,359 mn; extensive network: 56,400 locations.
news.summary:
Blue Dart shares Jan 2026 investor presentation, highlighting market leadership.
FY24-25 sales: ₹57,202 mn, EBITDA: ₹5,739 mn, EBT: ₹3,359 mn; extensive network: 56,400 locations.

news.title:
Blue Dart Express Ltd to hold an Analyst/Investor Call on Feb 9, 2026 via Zoom.
The call will discuss Q3 and nine-month performance; no sensitive info will be disclosed.
news.summary:
Blue Dart Express Ltd to hold an Analyst/Investor Call on Feb 9, 2026 via Zoom.
The call will discuss Q3 and nine-month performance; no sensitive info will be disclosed.

news.title:
Budget 2026 emphasizes aviation growth with duty exemptions to reduce costs, Rs 63,733.9 crore for aero engines, and Rs 2,102.87 crore for civil aviation, including regional connectivity.
Seaplane incentives, logistics reforms, and tourism measures aim to boost local manufacturing, connectivity, and employment, but infrastructure for seaplanes remains a concern.
news.summary:
Budget 2026 emphasizes aviation growth with duty exemptions to reduce costs, Rs 63,733.9 crore for aero engines, and Rs 2,102.87 crore for civil aviation, including regional connectivity.
Seaplane incentives, logistics reforms, and tourism measures aim to boost local manufacturing, connectivity, and employment, but infrastructure for seaplanes remains a concern.

news.title:
Blue Dart Express Q3 net profit fell to 700M vs 791M YoY.
Q3 revenue rose to 16.1B rupees from 15.1B rupees YoY.
news.summary:
Blue Dart Express Q3 net profit fell to 700M vs 791M YoY.
Q3 revenue rose to 16.1B rupees from 15.1B rupees YoY.

news.title:
Blue Dart reported Q3 FY26 revenue of ₹1,616.2 crore and ₹70 crore PAT.
Recognized ₹44.2 crore impact from new Labour Codes as exceptional item.
news.summary:
Blue Dart reported Q3 FY26 revenue of ₹1,616.2 crore and ₹70 crore PAT.
Recognized ₹44.2 crore impact from new Labour Codes as exceptional item.

news.title:
HDFC Mutual Fund's stake in Blue Dart Express Ltd increased from 5.01% to 7.17%.
The acquisition was made as per SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011, via open market.
news.summary:
HDFC Mutual Fund's stake in Blue Dart Express Ltd increased from 5.01% to 7.17%.
The acquisition was made as per SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011, via open market.

news.title:
Blue Dart Express conducted an NSE block trade of 60,277 shares at Rs. 5422.
The transaction value totaled Rs. 32.7 crores for Blue Dart Express.
news.summary:
Blue Dart Express conducted an NSE block trade of 60,277 shares at Rs. 5422.
The transaction value totaled Rs. 32.7 crores for Blue Dart Express.

news.title: Blue Dart shares rise after price hikes and tax demand dismissal.
news.summary: Blue Dart shares rise after price hikes and tax demand dismissal.

news.title:
Blue Dart Aviation received relief as ₹420.14 crore GST demand was dropped.
A smaller demand of ₹64.98 lakh, interest ₹41.72 lakh, and penalty ₹6.49 lakh confirmed.
news.summary:
Blue Dart Aviation received relief as ₹420.14 crore GST demand was dropped.
A smaller demand of ₹64.98 lakh, interest ₹41.72 lakh, and penalty ₹6.49 lakh confirmed.

news.title:
Blue Dart Express faces tax demand of ₹4.21B, with ₹4.2B provisioned.
Revised tax demand now reduced significantly to ₹6.5M.
news.summary:
Blue Dart Express faces tax demand of ₹4.21B, with ₹4.2B provisioned.
Revised tax demand now reduced significantly to ₹6.5M.

news.title:
Blue Dart Express (NSE:BLUEDART) trades at a high P/S ratio of 2.4x, above industry peers' 0.7x.
Revenue growth forecasted at 9.7% annually matches industry, making current valuation challenging to justify.
news.summary:
Blue Dart Express (NSE:BLUEDART) trades at a high P/S ratio of 2.4x, above industry peers' 0.7x.
Revenue growth forecasted at 9.7% annually matches industry, making current valuation challenging to justify.

news.title: Blue Dart CEO Balfour Manuel announces major investment and expansion plans.

news.title:
DHL group plans €1B investment in India by 2030, boosting logistics.
Funds will expand supply chains, warehouses for e-commerce, pharma, clean energy.
news.summary:
DHL group plans €1B investment in India by 2030, boosting logistics.
Funds will expand supply chains, warehouses for e-commerce, pharma, clean energy.

news.title:
Blue Dart Express posted Q2 FY26 revenue of INR 15,493 mn, PAT INR 795 mn.
Handled 106.3 mn shipments, 363,974 tons; B2C grew 18%, e-commerce up 30%.
news.summary:
Blue Dart Express posted Q2 FY26 revenue of INR 15,493 mn, PAT INR 795 mn.
Handled 106.3 mn shipments, 363,974 tons; B2C grew 18%, e-commerce up 30%.

news.title:
Blue Dart Express plans capex of INR 250-260 crore, aligned with historical levels.
Capex guidance may change only if major new opportunities emerge.
news.summary:
Blue Dart Express plans capex of INR 250-260 crore, aligned with historical levels.
Capex guidance may change only if major new opportunities emerge.

news.title:
Blue Dart Express plans to enhance margins but offers no specific targets.
Concall update highlights focus on margin improvement efforts.
news.summary:
Blue Dart Express plans to enhance margins but offers no specific targets.
Concall update highlights focus on margin improvement efforts.

news.title:
Blue Dart released its Investor Presentation showcasing strategic growth plans, sustainable practices, and investments for enhanced logistics services.
The presentation highlights market leadership in express delivery, leveraging air and ground networks, ESG alignment, and profitable growth strategies.
news.summary:
Blue Dart released its Investor Presentation showcasing strategic growth plans, sustainable practices, and investments for enhanced logistics services.
The presentation highlights market leadership in express delivery, leveraging air and ground networks, ESG alignment, and profitable growth strategies.

news.title: Blue Dart shares surged 7% post Q2 results announcement.
news.summary: Blue Dart shares surged 7% post Q2 results announcement.
